creator: jabley@clear.co.nz
text:
x11-clocks/wmcalclock/Makefile includes the following action under do-install:

  ${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/wmCalClock.1 ${PREFIX}/share/man/man1/

The /share/ is bogus.

Fix: Remove the /share/ --

buddha# diff -C 4 Makefile Makefile.new
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/x11-clocks/wmcalclock && make install
